# Graph Report - tokiSync  (2026-06-15)

## Corpus Check
- 104 files · ~108,716 words
- Verdict: corpus is large enough that graph structure adds value.

## Summary
- 3292 nodes · 8774 edges · 173 communities (148 shown, 25 thin omitted)
- Extraction: 97% EXTRACTED · 3% INFERRED · 0% AMBIGUOUS · INFERRED: 273 edges (avg confidence: 0.8)
- Token cost: 0 input · 0 output

## Graph Freshness
- Built from commit: `9ffa2bf0`
- Run `git rev-parse HEAD` and compare to check if the graph is stale.
- Run `graphify update .` after code changes (no API cost).
